title: Avery Dennison Corporation (AVY) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Avery Dennison Corporation (NYSE:AVY ) Q2 2023 Earnings Conference Call July 25, 2023 1:00 PM ET Company Participants John Eble - VP of Finance and IR Mitch Butier - Chairman and CEO Deon Stander - President and COO Greg Lovins - SVP and CFO Conference Call Participants John McNulty - BMO Capital Markets Ghansham Panjabi - Baird Anthony Pettinari - Citigroup Josh Spector - UBS Mike Roxland - Truist Securities Jeff Zekauskas - JPMorgan Securities George Staphos - Bank of America Christopher Kapsch - Loop Capital Markets Operator Ladies and gentlemen, thank you for standing by. [Operator Instructions] And welcome to Avery Dennison's Earnings Conference Call for the Second Quarter ended on July 1, 2023.

title: Avery Dennison (AVY) Q2 Earnings Miss, Revenues Dip Y/Y
text: Avery Dennison's (AVY) second-quarter earnings decline year over year.

title: Compared to Estimates, Avery Dennison (AVY) Q2 Earnings: A Look at Key Metrics
text: While the top- and bottom-line numbers for Avery Dennison (AVY) give a sense of how the business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it could be worth looking at how some of its key metrics compare to Wall Street estimates and year-ago values.

title: Avery Dennison (AVY) Lags Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
text: Avery Dennison (AVY) came out with quarterly earnings of $1.92 per share, missing the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $2.01 per share. This compares to earnings of $2.64 per share a year ago.

title: Avery Dennison Announces Second Quarter 2023 Results
text: MENTOR, Ohio--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Avery Dennison Corporation (NYSE:AVY) today announced preliminary, unaudited results for its second quarter ended July 1, 2023. Non-GAAP financial measures referenced in this release are reconciled from GAAP in the attached financial schedules. Unless otherwise indicated, comparisons are to the same period in the prior year. “Earnings per share increased sequentially in the second quarter, a trend we expect to continue in coming quarters,” said Mitch Butier, Chair.

title: Avery Dennison: Diversification Of Operations Resulting In Improved Cash Flows
text: Avery Dennison Corporation, a leading provider of digital identification systems and materials science, holds a market capitalization of $14.32 billion and a return on invested capital of 11%. Despite a 12% decline in year-over-year revenues, the company's diversification strategy and global presence have allowed it to tap into new markets such as the automotive industry. AVY currently holds a solid balance sheet to endure all economic cycles.

title: Avery Dennison (AVY) to Report Q2 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Avery Dennison's (AVY) Q2 results are likely to reflect the impacts of raw material and freight cost inflation, unfavorable currency translation, and supply-chain issues, offset by strong demand.

title: Analysts Estimate Avery Dennison (AVY) to Report a Decline in Earnings: What to Look Out for
text: Avery Dennison (AVY) doesn't possess the right combination of the two key ingredients for a likely earnings beat in its upcoming report. Get prepared with the key expectations.

title: Here's Why You Should Hold on to Avery Dennison (AVY) Stock Now
text: Avery Dennison (AVY) gains from strategic actions and strong demand amid cost headwinds.

title: Avery Dennison to Webcast Second Quarter 2023 Earnings Conference Call
text: MENTOR, Ohio--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Avery Dennison Corporation (NYSE: AVY) will host its second quarter 2023 earnings conference call in a live webcast at 1:00 p.m. ET on Tuesday, July 25, 2023. The company's second quarter news release will be issued that morning at 6:45 a.m. ET. This event will be webcast live, and a replay will be available on Avery Dennison's Investor Relations website (www.investors.averydennison.com). About Avery Dennison Avery Dennison Corporation (NYSE: AVY) is a global mate.
